What We Offer

End-to-End Business Solutions

From registration to legal, funding to branding — we provide comprehensive consultancy services designed to accelerate your business at every stage.

RegistrationLegal & IPCertificationsGrantsLoansBrandingCompliance

AARAMBH

Company Registration & Incorporation | 7 Services

Start your business journey with the right legal structure — from Private Limited to Section 8 companies, we handle complete registration.

Get StartedFree Consultation
Private Limited Company

Most popular business structure in India with limited liability and equity funding capability.

One Person Company (OPC)

For solo entrepreneurs wanting limited liability without a second shareholder.

LLP Registration

Hybrid of partnership and company with lower compliance costs.

Partnership Firm

Simple structure for two or more individuals sharing profits.

Section 8 Company

Non-profit company for charitable activities with tax exemptions.

12A & 80G Registration

Tax provisions for NGOs under Income Tax Act 1961.

NGO Darpan Registration

Registration on NITI Aayog portal for NGO transparency and grants.

KAVACH

Legal Protection & IP | 4 Services

Shield your business with comprehensive legal protection — trademark, patent, copyright registration, and labor compliance.

Get StartedFree Consultation
Trademark Registration

Legal protection for brand name, logo, or symbol.

Patent Registration

Exclusive rights over inventions for up to 20 years.

Copyright Registration

Legal right preventing copying of original works.

Shram Suvidha

One-stop labor compliance portal registration.

PRAMANIT

Certifications & Compliance | 14 Services

Get certified and unlock new business opportunities — Startup India, ISO, FSSAI, GST, IEC, NSIC, Udyam, and more.

Get StartedFree Consultation
Startup India (DPIIT)

Government flagship initiative for startup ecosystem support.

GeM Registration

Registration for selling to government entities.

ISO Certification

International quality standards certification.

GST Registration

Goods & Services Tax registration and compliance.

FSSAI Certificate

Mandatory food business license in India.

IEC Registration

Import Export Code for international trade.

NSIC Registration

NSIC registration for MSME government procurement benefits.

Udyam Registration

Free online MSME registration for government scheme eligibility.

80-IAC Tax Exemption

100% tax exemption on profits for 3 consecutive years.

GST LUT

Letter of Undertaking for exporting without paying IGST.

ZED Certificate

Zero Effect Zero Defect certification for MSMEs.

Make In India

Government initiative for manufacturing sector growth.

Pasara Certificate

Certification for specific industry compliance.

Income Tax

Income tax compliance and return filing services.

NIDHI

Government Grants & Funding | 7 Schemes

Access government-backed grants and funding schemes — Seed Fund, MSME Design, Gujarat Innovators, RKVY-RAFTAAR, and more.

View DetailsFree Consultation
Seed Fund (SISFS)

Up to ₹50 Lakh for startup proof-of-concept and market entry.

MSME Design Scheme

Max ₹40 Lakh for product design and innovation.

Gujarat Innovators

Up to ₹30 Lakh seed grants for innovators.

RKVY-RAFTAAR

Agri-entrepreneurship grants for farming profitability.

Textile Innovation Fund

Up to ₹1 Crore for textile sector innovation.

Seed Support Scheme

Up to ₹1 Crore early-stage startup funding.

PMEGP Loan

Up to ₹50 Lakh with 15-35% subsidy.

VIKAS

Loans & Capital | 7 Services

Comprehensive loan solutions for businesses — CGTMSE, MUDRA, PMEGP, Venture Capital, NAIFF, PMFME, and Maha Udyog Yojna.

View DetailsFree Consultation
CGTMSE Loan

Up to ₹5 Crore collateral-free loans.

MUDRA Loan (PMMY)

Up to ₹20 Lakh in Shishu, Kishore, Tarun categories.

PMEGP Loan

Up to ₹50 Lakh with 25-35% subsidy.

Venture Capital

Equity funding from ₹50L to ₹50 Crore.

NAIFF

Up to ₹2 Crore agriculture infrastructure financing.

PMFME

Up to ₹10 Lakh micro food processing subsidy.

Maha Udyog Yojna

Maharashtra state employment generation scheme.

VISTAR

Brand Building & Investor Readiness | 3 Services

Build a powerful brand and get investor-ready — Bhaskar ID, Financial Deck, Investor Deck preparation, and digital marketing.

View DetailsFree Consultation
Bhaskar ID

Digital platform connecting startup ecosystem stakeholders.

Financial Deck

Investor-grade financial presentations.

Investor Deck

Professional pitch deck for investor meetings.

Logo Design

Professional brand identity and logo creation.

Digital Marketing

Online marketing strategy and execution.

Website Development

Custom website design and development.

PRABANDHIT

Ongoing Compliance | 4 Services

Stay compliant effortlessly — ROC compliance for Pvt Ltd & LLP, GST compliances, income tax filing, and annual return management.

View DetailsFree Consultation
ROC Compliance Pvt Ltd

Annual filings AOC-4, MGT-7, ADT-1 for private companies.

ROC Compliance LLP

Form 8, Form 11, DIR-3 KYC for LLPs.

GST Compliances

GST return filing, audit, and reconciliation.

Income Tax Filing

ITR filing for businesses, companies, and individuals.

Also Available

Additional Services

Trademark & IP Registration

Protect your brand with trademark, patent, and copyright registration services.

Learn More

Income Tax Filing

Complete income tax return filing for individuals, businesses, and companies.

Learn More

NSIC Registration

Get NSIC certification for MSME government procurement benefits.

Letter of Undertaking for exporting without paying IGST upfront.

Learn More

NGO Darpan Registration

Registration on NITI Aayog portal for NGO transparency and grants.
